response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Verified that there are no vocals in the background music, matching the reference JSON's assessment of 'contains_vocal_music' as false. 2. JSON Usage: The video consists purely of visual slides and instrumental background music. Therefore, we translate and subtitle the prominent on-screen visual title cards (Opening Screen and Attention Screen). 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed visual card subtitles precisely to their on-screen durations during the instrumental sections.

subtitles.original: 【開演までしばらくお待ちください】

subtitles.original: 【ATTENTION / ご来場のお客様へ】演出の都合上、照明の点滅にご注意ください / 声出し応援OKです
